2603.09108.title: Composed Vision-Language Retrieval for Skin Cancer Case Search via Joint Alignment of Global and Local Representations
2603.09108.paper_summary: Medical image retrieval aims to identify clinically relevant lesion cases to support diagnostic decision making, education, and quality control. In practice, retrieval queries often combine a reference lesion image with textual descriptors such as dermoscopic features. We study composed vision-language retrieval for skin cancer, where each query consists of an image to text pair and the database contains biopsy-confirmed, multi-class disease cases. We propose a transformer based framework that learns hierarchical composed query representations and performs joint global-local alignment between queries and candidate images. Local alignment aggregates discriminative regions via multiple spatial attention masks, while global alignment provides holistic semantic supervision. The final similarity is computed through a convex, domain-informed weighting that emphasizes clinically salient local evidence while preserving global consistency. Experiments on the public Derm7pt dataset demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods. The proposed framework enables efficient access to relevant medical records and supports practical clinical deployment.
2603.09108.paper_summary_zh: 醫學影像檢索旨在識別臨床相關的病變案例，以支持診斷決策、教育和質量控制。<lb/>在實踐中，檢索查詢通常將參考病變影像與文本描述符（如皮膚鏡特徵）結合。<lb/>我們研究針對皮膚癌的組合視覺-語言檢索，其中每個查詢由影像與文本對組成，數據庫包含經活檢確認的多類別疾病案例。<lb/>我們提出了一種基於Transformer的框架，學習層次化的組合查詢表示，並在查詢和候選影像之間執行全局-局部聯合對齊。<lb/>局部對齊通過多個空間注意力掩碼聚合區別性區域，而全局對齊則提供整體語義監督。<lb/>最終的相似度是通過一個凸的、基於領域的加權計算的，強調臨床顯著的局部證據，同時保持全局一致性。<lb/>在公共的Derm7pt數據集上的實驗顯示出對最先進方法的一致改進。<lb/>所提出的框架使得有效訪問相關醫療記錄成為可能，並支持實際的臨床部署。
2603.09108.author: Yuheng Wang et.al.
2603.09108.authors: Yuheng Wang, Yuji Lin, Dongrun Zhu, Jiayue Cai, Sunil Kalia, Harvey Lui, Chunqi Chang, Z. Jane Wang, Tim K. Lee
